title: M.Com Jobs 2026 – Accountant Assistant
shortInfo: DHEW Tiruppur Recruitment 2026: District HUB for Empowerment of Women Tiruppur has announced 1 Accountant Assistant vacancy. Candidates can apply offline on or before 30 May 2026 through the official website tiruppur.nic.in.

basic_details.job_title: DHEW Tiruppur Accountant Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District HUB for Empowerment of Women Tiruppur
basic_details.short_information: DHEW Tiruppur Recruitment 2026: District HUB for Empowerment of Women Tiruppur has announced 1 Accountant Assistant vacancy. Candidates can apply offline on or before 30 May 2026 through the official website tiruppur.nic.in.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the DHEW Tiruppur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Com / M.Com, Computer Skill, 3 years working experience
qualification.details: B.Com / M.Com with Computer Skill and 3 years working experience.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tiruppur.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the DHEW Tiruppur Accountant Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for the Accountant Assistant post is 30th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Accountant Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Com or M.Com degree along with computer skills and a minimum of 3 years of working experience to be eligible for the Accountant Assistant position.

faq.question: What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Accountant Assistant post is 35 years. There is no mention of minimum age or age relaxation in the provided data.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Accountant Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Accountant Assistant post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month.

faq.question: How will candidates be selected for the Accountant Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Accountant Assistant recruitment will primarily involve Document Verification. Further details about the selection stages can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for the DHEW Tiruppur Accountant Assistant jobs?
faq.answer: The application process for the Accountant Assistant recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the District HUB for Empowerment of Women Tiruppur (DHEW Tiruppur).

faq.question: What is the job type for the Accountant Assistant position?
faq.answer: The Accountant Assistant position is a contractual job. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the contract.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DHEW Tiruppur, which is https://tiruppur.nic.in. The direct link to the notification is also provided in the Important Links section of this article.
